scripts.build: tailwindcss -i styles.css -o output.css --minify && mkdir -p dist/public/lib dist/public/routes dist/public/public && cp index.html app.js output.css manifest.json sw.js dist/public/ && cp lib/*.js dist/public/lib/ && cp routes/*.js dist/public/routes/ && cp public/* dist/public/public/ 2>/dev/null; true
